节点.功能描述: Provides network sharing related interfaces.
Get the handle of the data network.
Checks whether this device allows for network sharing. returns {@code false} otherwise.
注释信息: @param { AsyncCallback<boolean> } callback - Returns {@code true} indicating network sharing is supported;
@throws { BusinessError } 202 - Non-system applications use system APIs.
@throws { BusinessError } 2200002 - Failed to connect to the service.
@throws { BusinessError } 2202011 - Cannot get network sharing configuration.
@systemapi Hide this for inner system use.

parameters.说明: Returns {@code true} indicating network sharing is supported;

error_codes.description: Failed to connect to the service.
